/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/tests/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/tests/test_vm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/utils/file_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/utils/compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/base64.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/base32.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/base85.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/ascii85.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/hexcode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/encode/xorcode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/crypto/aes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/crypto/chacha20.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/vm/vm_compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_crypto.dir/src/vm/vm_stub.cpp.o -o test_crypto  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
